heroMetaText: My goal is to merge solid expertise in backend development with an aesthetic vision to realize groundbreaking projects in the digital ecosystem.

übermichText: I'm Caner Oktay, a professional in web development. I enjoy working on projects where creativity and technology come together.
übermichText2: Since 2005, I have worked on numerous projects while always focusing on creating value for my clients. I have experience in many frontend and backend technologies.
backEndEntText: I develop secure, scalable backend systems with C#, Python, and other languages.
mobileEntText: With React Native and Flutter, I develop native and hybrid mobile applications for iOS and Android.
webDesignText: I develop modern and responsive web applications. With Python, C#, PHP, HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript, I create websites that reach their target audience.
uiuxText: I prioritize user experience and create aesthetic and functional designs. I offer graphics that are calculated pixel by pixel.
dbText: I work with databases like MSSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and PostgreSQL, ensuring data security and performance.
seoText: I perform technical SEO, content optimization, and strategic improvements for search engines.
blogText: A space born from the passion for continuous learning and sharing. A blog where I share my notes on technology, art, and personal development. I invite you to see the world from my perspective and be part of this journey.
